highlights.text: Serial code MY-002 | TRAGUIN tour code TRG-MAL-DIS-2026
Country: Malaysia, Asia | Category: Best Malaysia Discovery Family Tour

itinerary.title: Malaysia Discovery Family Tour
itinerary.overview:
Kuala Lumpur • Batu Caves • Genting Highlands • Putrajaya 05 Nights / 06 Days Classic Malaysia Family Holiday SERIAL CODE: MY-002 TRAGUIN TOUR CODE: TRG-MAL-DIS-2026 STATE / COUNTRY: Malaysia CATEGORY: Best Malaysia Discovery Family Tour DURATION: 05 Nights / 06 Days DESTINATIONS: Kuala Lumpur (3N) + Genting Highlands (2N)

TOUR OVERVIEW
Discover the rich heritage and modern wonders of Malaysia with this TRAGUIN curated family itinerary. Designed for comfort and excitement, this Malaysia Discovery package offers a flawless blend of city exploration and highland adventure. Experience the best of Malaysian hospitality with TRAGUIN's handpicked hotels and exclusive services. THE IMMERSIVE DAY-WISE ITINERARY
itinerary.seo_title: MY-002 | Malaysia Discovery Family Tour | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 05 Nights / 06 Days Malaysia package (MY-002 / TRG-MAL-DIS-2026): Kuala Lumpur (3N) + with 4-tier handpicked accommodation.

days.title: ARRIVAL IN KUALA LUMPUR
days.description: THE GARDEN CITY WELCOME – CITY OF LIGHTS Arrive in Kuala Lumpur, the vibrant capital city. Your private TRAGUIN transfer will escort you to your premium hotel. Spend the evening enjoying the breathtaking landscapes of the city skyline from the KL Tower. Sightseeing: KL Tower observation deck, city orientation. Stay: Kuala Lumpur (Premium Hotel)
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: KUALA LUMPUR EXPLORATION
days.description: ICONIC ATTRACTIONS – PETRONAS TOWERS & BATU CAVES Visit the world-famous Petronas Twin Towers and the iconic Batu Caves. This curated experience offers deep insights into Malaysia's cultural diversity. Enjoy shopping and local food in the vibrant city center. Sightseeing: Petronas Towers, Batu Caves, Merdeka Square. Stay: Kuala Lumpur (Premium Hotel)
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: GENTING HIGHLANDS ADVENTURE
days.description: MOUNTAIN RETREAT – CABLE CAR VISTAS & THEME PARKS Head towards Genting Highlands. Experience a scenic cable car ride offering breathtaking landscapes. Spend time in the integrated theme parks—a highlight of TRAGUIN's exclusive packages. Sightseeing: Awana SkyWay, Indoor/Outdoor Theme Parks. Stay: Genting Highlands (Handpicked Hotel)
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: GENTING HIGHLANDS LEISURE
days.description: UNFORGETTABLE MEMORIES – RELAXATION & FAMILY FUN A full day dedicated to leisure and adventure. Explore Genting's exclusive experiences, including shopping malls, cinemas, and entertainment venues. Relax and enjoy the cool mountain weather with your family. Sightseeing: Genting SkyWorlds Theme Park. Stay: Genting Highlands (Handpicked Hotel)
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: PUTRAJAYA & RETURN TO KL
days.description: SCENIC BEAUTY – ADMINISTRATIVE CAPITAL & FAREWELL Visit Putrajaya, the administrative capital, featuring stunning architecture. Transfer back to Kuala Lumpur for your final evening of shopping and dining, celebrating the trip of a lifetime. Sightseeing: Putrajaya Mosque, Prime Minister's Office view. Stay: Kuala Lumpur (Premium Hotel)
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.
